## Checklist
- [ ] I've tested locally (`npm run dev`) on the affected pages
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No new env vars introduced — OR they're documented in `docs/STATUS.md`
- [ ] No new sensitive data in logs (PII, IPs, secrets)
- [ ] If this touches the schema: migration created + reviewed
- [ ] If this touches AI prompts: nonpartisan framing preserved
- [ ] DEVLOG entry added to top of `docs/DEVLOG.md` (for meaningful changes)
